public_wording: ProofBench X Research Hardening tests whether mathematical claims survive domain assumptions, hidden conditions, counterexamples, proof-object construction, and replay. It does not prove new mathematics; it verifies what conditions are required for a claim to be trusted.
mode: Research Hardening v0 (domain + assumption + witness + proof objects)
